prompt: What comes next? 3, 6, 9, 12, ___

What comes next? 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, ___

answer: Robin (it is a bird; the others are trees)

prompt: If today is the 12th, what date will it be in one week?

answer: They weigh the same — both are one pound

answer: Frying pan (the others are workshop tools)

prompt: If three friends each buy two tickets, how many tickets in all?

answer: A half-gallon (a half-gallon is two quarts)

prompt: If a tree grows 2 feet a year, how tall will it be in 5 years if it starts at 4 feet?

answer: A dog and a cat (8 legs vs. 6)
